# LLMCosts.dev — Morph Models Pricing
> Source: LLMCosts.dev — https://llmcosts.dev
> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Morph: Morph V3 Large](https://llmcosts.dev/models/morph-v3-large) | Morph | $0.9 | $1.9 | $None | 262,144 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
| [Morph: Morph V3 Fast](https://llmcosts.dev/models/morph-v3-fast) | Morph | $0.8 | $1.2 | $None | 81,920 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
